title: sphenodesme mollis
intro: Sphenodesme mollis, also known as the soft sphenodesme, is a type of plant in the genus Sphenodesme. It is a flowering plant native to Australia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The leaves and stems of Sphenodesme mollis have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Sphenodesme mollis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used internally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms.
